name: Anchor Point Bible Church
description: Come play pickleball at Anchor Point Bible Church in Norton Shores, MI! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — All funds collected go into a special pickleball account.

description: Come play pickleball at Beachwood Park in Muskegon, MI! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
